label: 174_kim_denuclearization_north korea_korea
description: Summit meetings between us president donald trump and north korean leader kim jong-un aimed at denuclearization, but faced challenges like media attention-seeking and missile testing. These summits raised hopes for resolving the nuclear issue but also highlighted the complex geopolitical dynamics involved.
